parameters-en.Threshold: Determines the signal level above which gets routed to Path B. Playing softer (signal below the Threshold) is routed to Path A; playing louder (signal above the Threshold) is routed to Path B.
parameters-en.Attack: Determines how fast the signal is routed to Path B once reaching the Threshold.
parameters-en.Decay: Determines how fast the signal returns to Path A once it falls below the Threshold.
parameters-en.Reverse: When set to "On," reverses the path assignments. (Any signal above the Threshold is sent to Path B, any signal below the Threshold is sent to Path A.)
